Petition For Discharge Of Executor, Peter Childress, Without Administration (Cal. Probate Code Sec 12251)
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate/Petition To Terminate The Estate For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate/Petition To Terminate The Estate For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To May-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate, Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal Or A Petition To Terminate For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Off Calendar

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Millar for Peter Childress (Petitioner). Alana Conner for William Murphy (Objector).

Counsel presented further oral argument to support their positions with regard to this Court having/not having jurisdiction over the wrongful death settlement initiated in Massachusetts. The Court ruled that there is no Trust before the Court for it to rule on and that the Court has no jurisdiction over any claim of the Trust. Ms. Conner is prepare the order. Status of the Estate/Petition to Terminate the Estate for Lack of Assets was set for May 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Millar for Peter Childress (Petitioner). Alana Grice Connor for William Murphy.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to this Court having/not having jurisdiction over the wrongful death settlement initiated in Massuchettes. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust, etc. was continued to January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Millar the opportunity to file a brief with regard to the above which is due by January 6, 2012. Ms. Connor's reply/opposition is due by January 13, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Continued To Sep-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Continued To Aug-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition: (1) To Determine Existence Of Trust;(2) For A Determination Of The Claims Of Trust Property;(3) Breach Of Trust;(4) Undue Infleuence;(5)Accounting; Ect.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clifford Fried for William Murphy. James Millar for Peter Childress (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Probate Department versus the Civil Department having jurisdiction over the matter, whether to proceed with the June 20th trial date on the Civil petition and stay of the Probate petition. The matter was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stayed all activity in the probate action without prejudice to the Parties coming back in if there is something urgent that needs to be addressed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
